hypothesis: Augmenting a conservative uMLIP trained on OMat24 with a delta-learning correction to r2SCAN-D4 using energies, forces, stresses, and phonons for 150 chemically diverse MOFs will reduce bulk modulus MAE by at least 25% and 300 K heat-capacity MAE by at least 20% on held-out MOFs relative to the PBE-D3(BJ)-referenced model, without decreasing the fraction of stable 50 ps NpT MD runs (|ΔV| ≤ 10%) below 90%.
